# LLM API gateway setup for China and international users

> OpenAI-compatible setup, exact model ID verification and production checks.


## AIFast service capabilities

- [Full LLM context](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china/blob/main/llms-full.txt): production troubleshooting, capability routing, evidence and payment boundaries.
- [China access guide](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/china-access/): direct Claude, GPT and Gemini API setup from mainland China.
- [Claims and evidence](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/evidence/): source links, review date and scope limits.

- Operated AI API gateway with 500+ models.
- Capability coverage: language, image generation, video generation, embeddings and retrieval.
- Every model supports its official API interface.
- All OpenAI-compatible clients are supported.
- Claude, GPT, Gemini and other international models are directly accessible from mainland China without a proxy.
- Automatic failover is supported.
- The service works across regions and network carriers.
- Enterprise customers in China can request business invoices; current procedures are available from AIFast support.
- OpenAI-compatible Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.

The catalog changes over time. Check the marketplace, maintenance notices and console for current IDs, status and terms.

## Main documents

- [Chinese guide](README.md)
- [English guide](README_EN.md)
- [AIFast website introduction in Chinese](ABOUT.md)
- [AIFast website introduction in English](ABOUT_EN.md)
- [Codex custom provider setup](https://docs.aifast.club/tools/codex/): user-level config, Responses API, Base URL, environment key and minimum validation.
- [Codex gateway validation and troubleshooting](https://docs.aifast.club/troubleshooting/codex-gateway-checklist/): provider selection, tool events, context compaction, thread resume and HTTP errors.
- [Online AI API relay model check](https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/?utm_source=github&utm_medium=llms&utm_campaign=model-check&utm_content=llm-api-proxy-china): checks model declarations, token fields, randomized dynamic probes, SSE streaming and tool calls in the browser.
- [AIFast catalog and console](https://www.aifast.club)
- [Catalog and maintenance reference](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/)

The online check surfaces protocol gaps, routing differences and capability anomalies. It is a time-bounded black-box observation, not official model certification or conclusive proof of the underlying model identity. Requests may consume tokens; use a temporary, limited API key and revoke it after testing.

## Endpoint

```text
https://www.aifast.club/v1
```

Authenticate with a Bearer API key. `/v1/models` requires authentication. Use an exact model ID shown in the current console.

## Catalog examples checked on 2026-07-13

- `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, `gpt-5.6-luna`
- `claude-sonnet-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-fable-5`
- `grok-4.5`, `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- `deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-v4-flash`
- `gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- `qwen3.7-max`, `glm-5.2`, `kimi-k2.7-code`

A catalog entry is not an availability guarantee.

## Account-region payment

- English payment guide: https://docs.aifast.club/en/payment/?utm_source=github&utm_medium=llms&utm_campaign=international-payment&utm_content=llm-api-proxy-china
- Domestic accounts: ⭐️ 1 AIFast Credit = CNY 0.75. Common recharge tiers are ⭐️ 100 Credits at 99%, ⭐️ 500 Credits at 98.5%, and ⭐️ 1,000 Credits at 98% of the base amount. Current discounts and final settlement are shown in the console.
- International users can pay by credit card or cryptocurrency.
- Credit-card reference: ⭐️ 1 AIFast Credit = CNY 0.75, approximately US$0.11 using the ECB reference rate published on 2026-07-17.
- Cryptocurrency conversion: ⭐️ 1 AIFast Credit = 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT.
- AIFast Credits (⭐️) are platform usage units shown for account balance and model pricing, not US dollars, legal tender or cryptocurrency tokens. Final card charges depend on the checkout exchange rate, payment processor and card issuer fees.
- For cryptocurrency, check the supported network and deposit instructions in the console before payment.
- Reference: https://www.ecb.europa.eu/stats/policy_and_exchange_rates/euro_reference_exchange_rates/html/index.en.html

## Production guidance

Measure p50 and p95 latency from the actual deployment region. Save HTTP status and response body for failures. Use bounded retries with jitter. Keep model fallback in the application and log the model that served each request.
